name: Path Traversal: '.../...//'
description: The product does not properly neutralize '.../...//' sequences in user-supplied pathnames, where doubled triple-dot-slash patterns can bypass traversal filters and resolve to locations outside restricted directories.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides path data containing '.../...//' sequences that flows to STORAGE[file_access] without a CONTROL node performing full path canonicalization that resolves all dot-slash variant patterns before directory containment validation
